things.name: Fortaleza de Sao Miguel
things.description: 16th-century Portuguese fortress overlooking Luanda Bay - now the Armed Forces Museum

things.name: Ilha do Cabo
things.description: Sandy peninsula with beaches, seafood restaurants and views of the Luanda skyline

things.name: Museu Nacional de Antropologia
things.description: Angola's leading museum of traditional culture, masks and tribal artefacts

things.name: Mercado do Kinaxixi
things.description: Bustling circular market for fresh produce, crafts and everyday life in Luanda

things.name: Kalandula Falls
things.description: One of Africa's largest waterfalls - a 105m curtain of water in the jungle

things.name: Quicama National Park
things.description: Angola's premier safari park recovering after civil war with elephants and lions

things.name: Muxima Church & Quanza River
things.description: 16th-century Portuguese church on a dramatic cliff overlooking the Quanza River

things.name: Marginal Waterfront Promenade
things.description: Luanda's renovated palm-lined bay promenade with views of the South Atlantic

things.name: Luanda Cathedral
things.description: 17th-century Portuguese colonial cathedral - the oldest Catholic church in Angola

things.name: Futungo de Belas Beach
things.description: South Luanda beach with calmer Atlantic waters and local beach life
